commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=719e329c4abc473c6dfd38c031e3a5cbf0f29e9c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `openclaw.mjs` to recognize Bun-style raw-specifier optional import misses and adds a launcher e2e probe for direct versus transitive miss classification.

PR surface: Tests +48, Other +6. Total +54 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source path is clear: Bun-shaped optional warning-filter misses without `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` fall through the existing guard and are rethrown, although I did not run live Bun in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-provided live Bun proof is still required, and the remaining code blocker is small but should be fixed before maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(cli): handle Bun optional import misses
target.body:
Fixes #86198

## Summary
- Recognize Bun-style direct module-miss messages in the launcher optional-import guard.
- Keep Node direct misses supported through `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND`, URL, and absolute-path checks.
- Preserve the transitive-miss behavior so missing dependencies from `dist/entry.js` are still surfaced instead of being treated as missing OpenClaw build output.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 23 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check openclaw.mjs test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json openclaw.mjs test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts`

Note: commit is SSH-signed locally and verified with `git log --show-signature -1` after rebasing onto current `main`.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
